atomicity.message: The staged payload is one docs-only retrospective for the completed OXP round: docs/oxp-round-retrospective-2026-07.md.

conditions.message: The staged Markdown retrospective passes the requested docs hygiene checks.
evidence: git diff --cached --check exited 0.
git show :docs/oxp-round-retrospective-2026-07.md | rg -n -- ' -> |=>|→|—' returned no matches.
git diff --cached --name-status showed only A docs/oxp-round-retrospective-2026-07.md.
go run ./cmd/burpvalve hash --staged --json matched sha256:7555e6859ac1a60b9128973fdc9a122f5bbe8604b1046806ed31aea59d380c73.

conditions.message: The retrospective consolidates final-round facts into one durable doc without adding duplicate implementation paths.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-status showed exactly A docs/oxp-round-retrospective-2026-07.md.
git diff --cached --stat showed one new docs file with no code or config changes.

git show :docs/oxp-round-retrospective-2026-07.md showed a single structured retrospective with sources, ledger, defect narrative, protocol corrections, completion evaluation, open remainder, and judgment sections.

conditions.message: The doc does not rubber-stamp completion; it records the final-acceptance hold, the fix-over-waive ruling, product defect #12, protocol corrections, and remaining blocked or deferred work.
evidence: The Verifier-Caught Defect 12 section says ci --commit failed on multi-cluster historical commits, the ruling was to fix and not waive, and 92a8e17 fixed it while wrong-feature still fails.

BrightOwl's commit/attestation loop over all 15 ledger rows found each referenced attestation in the named commit, each with 13 conditions, and each attestation feature id matching the documented bead or feature.
br list -a --limit 1000 --json showed the OXP option-A truth-table bead and other p4 beads still deferred, and OSL owner-decision/open-source-launch beads still open.
ScarletMarsh confirmed the doc names open remainder instead of laundering incomplete work into a completion claim.

conditions.message: The staged payload is retrospective documentation only and adds no functions, code paths, tests, or executable behavior.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-status showed only A docs/oxp-round-retrospective-2026-07.md.
git show :docs/oxp-round-retrospective-2026-07.md showed prose, tables, and retrospective notes only.

conditions.message: The requested retrospective contents are present and supported by evidence.
evidence: The staged hash matched sha256:7555e6859ac1a60b9128973fdc9a122f5bbe8604b1046806ed31aea59d380c73.
Every requested ledger commit appears in the doc: 2858846, 711063d, 126a0fc, c8d0a2d, 932abfc, 8520bfb, 1ead769, 0c41470, e3464a4, 0a6deb7, f3c4a46, dc8c2ee, 92a8e17, dfda7b1, and c466233.
The attestation cross-check verified all 15 ledger commit, attestation, and feature rows exist and match with 13 conditions each.
plans/orchestration-goal-prompt.md has six completion criteria and the staged doc's Completion-Criteria Evaluation section addresses all six.
git diff --cached --check exited 0 and the bare arrow/em-dash hazard scan produced no matches.

conditions.message: The retrospective carries concrete commit, bead, attestation, findings, and completion evidence.
evidence: The staged doc contains a commit ledger for 2858846 through 92a8e17 plus dfda7b1 and c466233, including bead or feature names and attestation paths.
ScarletMarsh checked all 15 referenced attestation JSON files exist.

br list -a --limit 300 --json and br show confirmed OXP delivery and final beads are closed, the ci-commit blocker is closed with 92a8e17 and e2332d..., and project-readiness-kit-oxp-defer-option-a-truth-table-me5 is deferred as described.
The doc cites docs/dogfooding-findings-2026-07.md findings A23 and C19-C21 as required.

conditions.message: The staged payload is a docs-only retrospective and stays within the requested OXP retrospective scope.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-status showed only A docs/oxp-round-retrospective-2026-07.md.
The doc scopes itself to OXP round reconstruction, support commits dfda7b1 and c466233, protocol corrections, completion criteria, and open remainder.
br list -a --limit 1000 --json confirmed the doc's open-remainder categories: OSL beads are open and deferred beads remain deferred by design.
ScarletMarsh independently confirmed the document content stays within ledger, defect #12, protocol corrections, completion criteria evaluation, and open remainder.

conditions.message: The document does not instruct destructive operations or bypass behavior.
evidence: ScarletMarsh searched the staged doc for destructive, secret, and auth terms; the only relevant match was a non-command mention of the GATE-WINDOW token.
The document does not instruct destructive shell commands, repo deletion, force pushes, secret handling, or bypass actions.

conditions.message: The staged document's ledger and defect narrative are backed by git history, attestation files, and live commit-scoped CI checks.
evidence: go run ./cmd/burpvalve hash --staged --json returned sha256:7555e6859ac1a60b9128973fdc9a122f5bbe8604b1046806ed31aea59d380c73 with included path docs/oxp-round-retrospective-2026-07.md and no hash-excluded staged paths.
git log contains the ledger commits.
Every ledger attestation path exists.

ScarletMarsh spot-ran ci --commit for f3c4a46 with project-readiness-kit-oxp-option-b-install-surfaces-idu, dc8c2ee with project-readiness-kit-oxp-skill-refactor-prompt-bank-fy8, and 92a8e17 with project-readiness-kit-ci-commit-multicluster-feature-9hf; all returned passed.

conditions.message: The doc preserves launch and security boundaries by keeping outward-facing OSL work and issue filing behind owner decisions.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-status showed only a new docs markdown file, no secret, config, auth, or source files.

The Open Remainder section says OSL owner-decision beads remain blocked until owner answers launch questions, including public visibility, license choice, launch metadata, and irreversible or outward-facing actions.

docs/upstream-br-feedback-2026-07.md states filing upstream issues is outward-facing and waits for owner approval; docs/burpvalve-issue-drafts-2026-07.md says local draft only and filing belongs to rel issue-hygiene or direct owner instruction.
ScarletMarsh independently found no credentials, authentication instructions, authority expansion, external publication steps, bypass guidance, or new trust-boundary claims.

conditions.message: The staged payload changes no UI rendering, terminal rendering, screenshots, demos, CSS, TUI code, or visual assets.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-status showed only A docs/oxp-round-retrospective-2026-07.md.

conditions.message: The staged payload is documentation and introduces no runtime path, algorithm, query, concurrency behavior, benchmark target, or performance-sensitive code.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-status showed only A docs/oxp-round-retrospective-2026-07.md.
git show :docs/oxp-round-retrospective-2026-07.md contains a Markdown retrospective only.

conditions.message: The retrospective reinforces the autonomy contract instead of widening it.
evidence: plans/orchestration-goal-prompt.md states autonomy by documentation, owner veto after the fact, and hard exceptions for irreversible or outward-facing actions and owner-decision blockers.
The staged doc cites D11 and D5, says owner-decision OSL work remains outside the round, and lists two local-only issue bundles parked for owner approval before external filing.
br list -a --limit 1000 --json showed OSL launch/decision beads still open and deferred beads still deferred, matching the doc's autonomy-boundary and open-remainder claims.
